daily_take.headline: Diamondbacks Collapse to 18.5% Signals Sharp Money Knows Something
daily_take.deck: The D-backs dropped 25 points in 24 hours on what should be a winnable matchup against Baltimore. This isn't random noise. Sharp bettors are pricing in either health concerns we haven't heard about or they've spotted something in the Orioles' recent form that casual money missed. At 18.5%, you're paying heavy juice for a team that had better odds yesterday for the same game. Pass unless you have intel the market doesn't.
